ast.name: error
ast.source: This browser lacks typed array (Uint8Array) support which is required by `buffer` v5.x. Use `buffer` v4.x if you require old browser support.
ast.target: 此浏览器缺少 `buffer` v5.x 所需的类型化数组 (Uint8Array) 支持。如果您需要旧版浏览器支持，请使用 `buffer` v4.x。

ast.name: error
ast.source: Cannot write after close. Assign an onready handler.
ast.target: 关闭后无法写入。请分配一个 onready 处理程序。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Digital timing diagram in your browser
ast.target: 在浏览器中查看数字时序图

ast.name: message
ast.source: [Semantic]: The root has to be an Object: "{signal:[...]}"
ast.target: [语义]：根对象必须是一个对象：\"{signal:[...]}\"

ast.name: message
ast.source: [Semantic]: "signal" object has to be an Array "signal:[]"
ast.target: [语义]：\"signal\" 对象必须是一个数组 \"signal:[]\"

ast.name: message
ast.target: [语义]：\"assign\" 对象必须是一个数组 \"assign:[]\"

ast.name: message
ast.source: [Semantic]: "signal:[...]" or "assign:[...]" property is missing inside the root Object
ast.target: [语义]：根对象内缺少 \"signal:[...]\" 或 \"assign:[...]\" 属性
